## Summary

Describe the issue or proposal briefly.

- [ ] Validation issue
- [ ] Missing field
- [ ] Field semantics unclear

- [ ] Compatibility concern

Explain the current issue.

## Proposed Resolution

Describe the change you recommend.

## Compatibility Impact

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

## Additional Context

Add any references, examples, or implementation notes here.
